abilities.description: Throws a grenade at an area-targeted location that damages upon impact. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 0. Health Cost: 75. Cast Range: 900. Effect Radius: 300. First Damage: 50. Additionally applies a movement speed slow and damage per second debuff on all affected enemy units.

Bloodstone.name: Bloodstone
Bloodstone.description: The Bloodstone's bright ruby color is unmistakable on the battlefield, as the owner seems to have infinite vitality and spirit.

abilities.name: Bloodpact
abilities.description: Greatly increases the passive spell lifesteal for a while. Cooldown: 30. Duration: 5.

abilities.name: Spell Weakness Aura
abilities.description: Weakens nearby enemies by applying a debuff that amplifies any spell damage they take. Radius: 1200. Spell Damage Amp: 12%.

Bloodthorn.name: Bloodthorn
Bloodthorn.description: A reviled blade that bites deeper with each wriggle of its victim's final throes.

abilities.name: Soul Rend
abilities.description: Silences a target enemy for a while. At the end of the duration, a portion of all damage they took during the silence is dealt to them again, as magical damage. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 150. Cast Range: 900. Accumulated Damage: 60%. Duration: 5. Bonus Magical Damage: 50. The caster's units gain full accuracy against the target. Additionally, whenever the target gets attacked by any unit, they take additional magical damage.

abilities.name: Pierce
abilities.description: Grants the wielder's attack a chance to pierce through evasion and deal bonus magical damage. Proc Chance: 40%. Bonus Magical Damage: 60.

Boots of Bearing.name: Boots of Bearing
Boots of Bearing.description: Resplendent footwear fashioned for the ancient herald that first dared spread the glory of Stonehall beyond the original borders of its nascent claim.

abilities.name: Endurance
abilities.description: Grants movement and attack speed to all nearby allies for a short while on cast. Cooldown: 30. Radius: 1200. Move Speed Bonus: 15%. Attack Speed Bonus: 50. Duration: 6. Slow Resistance: 100%. Briefly turns allies immune to slows as well.

abilities.name: Swiftness Aura
abilities.description: Increases the movement speed of nearby allies by a flat amount. Radius: 1200. Move Speed Bonus: 20. Health Regeneration Bonus: 2.5. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: Upgrade Town Portal Scroll
abilities.description: Refunds all Town Portal Scrolls the hero currently has equipped, using the regular sellback value. After that, grants the hero a new Town Portal Scroll for free. Teleport Cooldown: 40.

Bottle.name: Bottle
Bottle.description: An old bottle that survived the ages, the contents placed inside become enchanted.

abilities.name: Regenerate
abilities.description: Restores health and replenishes mana for a while, by increasing health and mana regeneration. Number of Charges: 3. Cooldown: 0.5. Cast Range: 350. Total Heal: 110. Total Mana Restore: 60. Regen Duration: 2.7. Restores all charges while within the Fountain area. Restores all charges when respawning on the Ofrenda.

abilities.name: Store Rune
abilities.description: Couriers can neither activate nor store runes. Cast Range: 150. Max Store Rune Duration: 90.

Bracer.name: Bracer
Bracer.description: The bracer is a common choice to toughen up defenses and increase longevity.

Broadsword.name: Broadsword
Broadsword.description: The classic weapon of choice for knights, this blade is sturdy and reliable for slaying enemies.

Buckler.name: Buckler
Buckler.description: A powerful shield that imbues the bearer with the strength of heroes past, it is capable of protecting entire armies in battle.

abilities.name: Buckler Aura
abilities.description: Increases the armor of nearby player-controlled allies. Radius: 1200. Armor Bonus: 2. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

Butterfly.name: Butterfly
Butterfly.description: Only the mightiest and most experienced of warriors can wield the Butterfly, but it provides incredible dexterity in combat.

Chainmail.name: Chainmail
Chainmail.description: A medium weave of metal chains.

Chasm Stone.name: Chasm Stone
Chasm Stone.description: Chasm Stone is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Miscellaneous.

Cheese.name: Cheese
Cheese.description: Made from the milk of a long lost Furbolg vendor, it restores the vitality of those who taste it.

abilities.name: Fondue
abilities.description: Both heals and mana restores a flat amount instantly upon cast. Cooldown: 40. Heal: 2500. Mana Restored: 1500.

Circlet.name: Circlet
Circlet.description: An elegant circlet designed for human princesses.

Clarity.name: Clarity
Clarity.description: Clear water that enhances the ability to meditate.

abilities.name: Replenish
abilities.description: Increases the target's mana regeneration for a while. Cooldown: 0. Cast Range: 250. Damage Threshold: 0. Mana Regen Bonus: 6. Duration: 25.

Claymore.name: Claymore
Claymore.description: A sword that can cut through armor, it's a commonly chosen first weapon for budding swordsmen.

Cloak.name: Cloak
Cloak.description: A cloak made of a magical material that works to dispel any magic cast on it.

Consecrated Wraps.name: Consecrated Wraps
Consecrated Wraps.description: Consecrated Wraps is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Support.

abilities.name: Hallowed
abilities.description: Number of Charges: 3. Move Speed Bonus: 15%. Move Speed Duration: 5. Barrier Duration: 5. Duration: 3.

Crella's Crozier.name: Crella's Crozier
Crella's Crozier.description: Crella's Crozier is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Support.

abilities.name: Rite of Rumusque
abilities.description: Cooldown: 20. Duration: 4.

abilities.name: Putrefaction Aura
abilities.description: Reduces nearby enemy heroes' Health Restoration by 30%. Radius: 900. Health Restore Reduction: 30%.

Crimson Guard.name: Crimson Guard
Crimson Guard.description: A cuirass originally built to protect against the dreaded Year Beast.

abilities.name: Guard
abilities.description: Grants nearby allied heroes and buildings a guaranteed chance to block a fixed portion of physical attack damage, plus a portion based on the caster's max health. Cooldown: 40. Mana Cost: 75. Radius: 1200. Proc Chance: 100%. Base Blocked Damage: 70/45. Max Health as Blocked Damage: 2%.

abilities.name: Damage Block
abilities.description: Grants the wielder a chance to block a fixed portion of physical attack damage. Proc Chance: 60%. Blocked Damage: 75. Blocked Damage: 50.

Crown.name: Crown
Crown.description: A stately crown created to ensure a well-meaning but ungifted heir could fend off usurpers and govern with a strong hand.

Crystalys.name: Crystalys
Crystalys.description: A blade forged from rare crystals, it seeks weak points in enemy armor.

abilities.name: Critical Strike
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks have a chance to inflict critical damage. Proc Chance: 30%. Critical Damage: 160%.

Daedalus.name: Daedalus
Daedalus.description: A weapon of incredible power that is difficult for even the strongest of warriors to control.

abilities.name: Critical Strike
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks have a chance to inflict critical damage. Proc Chance: 30%. Critical Damage: 225%.

Dagon.name: Dagon
Dagon.description: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

abilities.name: Energy Burst
abilities.description: Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit, dealing great damage. Cooldown: 27/24/21/18/15. Mana Cost: 120/140/160/180/200. Cast Range: 640. Damage: 400/500/600/700/800.

Demon Edge.name: Demon Edge
Demon Edge.description: One of the oldest weapons forged by the Demon-Smith Abzidian, it killed its maker when he tested its edge.

Desolator.name: Desolator
Desolator.description: A wicked weapon, used in torturing political criminals.

abilities.name: Corruption
abilities.description: The wielder's successful attack applies an armor reduction debuff on the affected enemy unit. Armor Reduction: 6. Duration: 7.

abilities.description: Increases the item's bonus attack damage per debuff-affected enemy hero killed by Corruption. Attack Damage Bonus per Stack: 1.

Diadem.name: Diadem
Diadem.description: A crown that can never be removed.

Diffusal Blade.name: Diffusal Blade
Diffusal Blade.description: An enchanted blade that allows the user to cut straight into the enemy's soul.

abilities.name: Inhibit
abilities.description: Greatly slows the target enemy's movement speed, which decays over the duration. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 25. Cast Range: 600. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Slow Decay Rate: 0.8. Duration: 4.

abilities.name: Manabreak
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks burn their target's mana and deal damage equal to a percentage of the mana burnt. Mana Burn per Hit: 40. Mana Burn to Damage Factor: 1. Does not stack with Diffusal Blade-based abilities. Stacks additively with other sources of Mana Break.

Disperser.name: Disperser
Disperser.description: Once entrusted to an Apostle General of the Rumusque Faithful's expiditionary force.

abilities.name: Suppress
abilities.description: When cast on an enemy, dispels the target and greatly slows their movement speed, which decays over the duration. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 75. Cast Range: 600. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Slow Decay Rate: 1. Duration: 5. When cast on an ally or self, dispels the target, grants them slow resistance, and greatly increases their movement speed, which decays over the duration. The wielder always gets the dispel and the allied buff, no matter whom Suppress is cast on.

abilities.name: Manabreak
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks burn their target's mana and deal damage equal to a percentage of the mana burnt. Mana Burn per Hit: 40. Mana Burn to Damage Factor: 1. Does not stack with Diffusal Blade-based abilities. Stacks additively with other sources of Mana Break.

Divine Rapier.name: Divine Rapier
Divine Rapier.description: So powerful, it cannot have a single owner.

abilities.name: Transmute
abilities.description: Toggle on to gain bonus spell damage amplification. Cooldown: 6. Mana Cost: 0. Spell Damage Amplification Bonus: 25%. Attack Damage Bonus: 250.

abilities.name: Everlasting
abilities.description: The rapier belongs to the player that purchased it, and is muted when held by allies. The purchasing player can manually drop or stash the Rapier freely at any time.

Dragon Lance.name: Dragon Lance
Dragon Lance.description: The forward charge of the wyvern host grants no quarter.

abilities.name: Dragon's Reach
abilities.description: Grants flat attack range bonus to ranged wielders. Attack Range Bonus: 130.

Drum of Endurance.name: Drum of Endurance
Drum of Endurance.description: A relic that enchants the bodies of those around it for swifter movement in times of crisis.

abilities.name: Endurance

Dust of Appearance.name: Dust of Appearance
Dust of Appearance.description: One may hide visage, but never volume.

abilities.name: Reveal
abilities.description: The debuff applied on affected enemy units lingers after leaving the effect radius. Cooldown: 30. Effect Radius: 1050. Damage: 25. Move Speed Slow: 20%. Duration: 12. Aura Linger Duration: 8.

Eaglesong.name: Eaglesong
Eaglesong.description: Capturing the majestic call of an eagle, this mystical horn brings limitless dexterity to those who hear it.

Echo Sabre.name: Echo Sabre
Echo Sabre.description: A deceptively swift blade imbued with resonant magic.

abilities.name: Echo Strike
abilities.description: The next attack grants the wielder a buff that greatly increases attack speed for one attack. Cooldown: 5. Mana Cost: 0. Attack Speed Bonus: 490. Number of Attacks: 1. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Duration: 0.8. The triggering attack also briefly slows the enemy's movement speed. The second attack does not slow.

Enchanted Mango.name: Enchanted Mango
Enchanted Mango.description: The bittersweet flavors of Jidi Isle are irresistible to amphibians.

abilities.name: Eat Mango
abilities.description: Consumes the mango and instantly mana restores. Cooldown: 0. Cast Range: 400. Mana Restored: 100. Total Pick-up Range: 300.

Energy Booster.name: Energy Booster
Energy Booster.description: This lapis gemstone is commonly added to the collection of wizards seeking to improve their presence in combat.

Essence Distiller.name: Essence Distiller
Essence Distiller.description: Essence Distiller is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Support.

abilities.name: Soul Release
abilities.description: When cast on an ally, consumes a charge to grant the target allied hero bonus health regeneration for a while. Number of Charges: ∞. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 1000. Health Regen Bonus: 40. Duration: 8. When cast on an enemy, consumes a charge to deal damage over time and provide True Sight to the target for a while. Can be ground targeted to lie dormant and attach to the first enemy that comes within range.

Ethereal Blade.name: Ethereal Blade
Ethereal Blade.description: A flickering blade of a ghastly nature, it is capable of dealing damage in both magical and physical planes.

abilities.name: Ether Blast
abilities.description: Blasts the target with an projectile that turns them ethereal, rendering them immune to physical damage and not attackable, but more vulnerable to magical damage, as well as disarming them. Cooldown: 22. Mana Cost: 100. Cast Range: 800. Duration: 4. Base Damage: 50. Summed Attributes as Damage: 100%. If the target is an enemy, they also have their movement speed slowed, and take damage based on the sum of the caster's attributes.

Eul's Scepter of Divinity.name: Eul's Scepter of Divinity
Eul's Scepter of Divinity.description: A mysterious scepter passed down through the ages, its disruptive winds can be used for good or evil.

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.description: Sweeps the caster up into a cyclone, applying a basic dispel, fully disabling them and turning them invulnerable for a short while. Cooldown: 23. Mana Cost: 175. Cast Range: 550. Duration: 2.5. Damage: 50. If the target is an enemy, they also take damage upon landing. Cannot lift up Roshan, instead, it instantly applies the damage.

Eye of Skadi.name: Eye of Skadi
Eye of Skadi.description: Extremely rare artifact, guarded by the azure dragons.

abilities.name: Cold Attack
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks apply a movement speed and attack speed slow on enemy units. Move Speed Slow: 25%. Attack Speed Slow: 20%. Duration: 3. Health Restore Reduction: 50%. Move Speed Slow: 50%. The frigid attacks also reduce the effectiveness of healing and health restoration on the targets.

Faerie Fire.name: Faerie Fire
Faerie Fire.description: The ethereal flames from the ever-burning ruins of Kindertree ignite across realities.

abilities.name: Imbue
abilities.description: Consumes the Faerie Fire and instantly health restores. Cooldown: 5. Heal: 85.

Falcon Blade.name: Falcon Blade
Falcon Blade.description: An enchanted blade that long ago raised a hopeless urchin from pauper to king.

Fluffy Hat.name: Fluffy Hat
Fluffy Hat.description: Fine and functional foppery for the fashion-forward fighter.

Force Staff.name: Force Staff
Force Staff.description: Allows you to manipulate others, for good or evil.

abilities.name: Force
abilities.description: Pushes the target unit in the direction they are facing. Cooldown: 19. Mana Cost: 150. Cast Range: 550. Push Distance: 600. Push Duration: 0.5.

Gauntlets of Strength.name: Gauntlets of Strength
Gauntlets of Strength.description: Studded leather gloves that add brute strength.

Gem of True Sight.name: Gem of True Sight
Gem of True Sight.description: Not one thrall creature of the depths, Nor spirit bound in drowning's keep, Nor Maelrawn the Tentacular, Shall rest till seas, gem comes to sleep.

abilities.name: Reveal
abilities.description: Reveals and exposes enemy units and wards within the target area for a while. Cooldown: 12. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 300. Radius: 300. Duration: 4. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: True Sight
abilities.description: Reveals nearby invisible enemy units and wards, rendering them visible to the owner and their team. Reveal Radius: 900. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: Everlasting
abilities.description: While on the ground, the gem provides flying vision around itself to the last team that dropped it. Vision Radius: 300.

Ghost Scepter.name: Ghost Scepter
Ghost Scepter.description: Imbues the wielder with a ghostly presence, allowing them to evade physical damage.

abilities.name: Ghost Form
abilities.description: Turns the wielder ethereal, rendering them immune to physical damage and not attackable, but more vulnerable to magical damage, as well as disarming them. Cooldown: 22. Duration: 4.

Gleipnir.name: Gleipnir
Gleipnir.description: Bindings forged by impossible means to leash an ancient evil.

abilities.name: Eternal Chains
abilities.description: Launches shackles at enemies within the area, rooting them in place and revealing them. Cooldown: 18. Mana Cost: 150. Cast Range: 1100. Radius: 275. Duration: 2.

Glimmer Cape.name: Glimmer Cape
Glimmer Cape.description: The stolen cape of a master illusionist.

abilities.name: Glimmer
abilities.description: Applies a buff that periodically turns the target invisible and phased over the duration, even if the invisibility gets broken. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 125. Cast Range: 600. Duration: 5. Magical Damage Barrier: 375. Move Speed Bonus: 20. Grants the target a magical damage barrier for the whole duration. Depleting the barrier does not prematurely end the ability.

Gloves of Haste.name: Gloves of Haste
Gloves of Haste.description: A pair of magical gloves that seems to render weapons weightless.

Guardian Greaves.name: Guardian Greaves
Guardian Greaves.description: One of many holy instruments constructed to honor the Omniscience.

abilities.name: Mend
abilities.description: Applies a basic dispel on the caster and restores health and replenishes mana to nearby allies on cast. Cooldown: 45. Radius: 1200. Heal: 325. Mana Replenished: 200. Stack Limit Duration: 44.

abilities.name: Guardian Aura
abilities.description: Increases the health regeneration and mana regeneration of nearby allies. Radius: 1200. Health Regeneration Bonus: 2.5. Mana Regeneration Bonus: 1.5. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Health Threshold: 25%. Health Regeneration Bonus: 14.5.

Hand of Midas.name: Hand of Midas
Hand of Midas.description: Preserved through unknown magical means, the Hand of Midas is a weapon of greed, sacrificing animals to line the owner's pockets.

abilities.name: Transmute
abilities.description: Instantly kills the target non-hero unit, transmuting it into gold. Sets the target's gold bounty to a fixed value, while granting the target's default experience value without sharing it with others nearby. Number of Charges: 2. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 600. Number of Random Allies: 1. Number of Random Allies (Turbo Mode): 2. If cast on a neutral creep, also grants a few Madstone to the caster, and one to random allies. A newly acquired Hand of Midas starts with 1 charge.

Harpoon.name: Harpoon
Harpoon.description: A perfect solution for the flight of foes.

abilities.name: Draw Forth
abilities.description: Launches a harpoon that latches onto the target, pulling the caster and the target towards each other, meeting in the middle. Targeting a tree always pulls you all the way to the tree. Has a maximum pull distance. Cooldown: 19. Mana Cost: 50. Cast Range: 700. Min Pull Distance: 100. Max Pull Distance: 1000. Pull Duration: 0.3. When the caster is ranged, pulls the target and the caster for a percentage of the distance instead, but still respecting the max pull distance.

abilities.name: Echo Strike
abilities.description: The next attack grants the wielder a buff that greatly increases attack speed for one attack. Cooldown: 5. Attack Speed Bonus: 490. Number of Attacks: 1. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Duration: 1. The triggering attack also briefly slows the enemy's movement speed. The second attack does not slow.

Headdress.name: Headdress
Headdress.description: Creates a soothing aura that restores allies in battle.

abilities.name: Regeneration Aura
abilities.description: Increases the health regeneration of nearby allies. Radius: 1200. Health Regeneration Bonus: 2. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

Healing Salve.name: Healing Salve

Heart of Tarrasque.name: Heart of Tarrasque
Heart of Tarrasque.description: Preserved heart of an extinct monster, it bolsters the bearer's fortitude.

abilities.name: Behemoth's Blood
abilities.description: Increases the wielder's health regeneration based on missing health. Missing Health as Health Regen Bonus: 1.5%.

Heaven's Halberd.name: Heaven's Halberd
Heaven's Halberd.description: This halberd moves with the speed of a smaller weapon, allowing the bearer to win duels that a heavy edge would not.

abilities.name: Disarm
abilities.description: Disarms the targeted enemy unit, preventing them from attacking. Cooldown: 16 seconds. Mana Cost: 25. Cast Range: 750. Duration: 3.5 seconds.

Helm of Iron Will.name: Helm of Iron Will
Helm of Iron Will.description: The helmet of a legendary warrior who fell in battle.

Helm of the Dominator.name: Helm of the Dominator
Helm of the Dominator.description: The powerful headpiece of a dead necromancer.

abilities.name: Dominate
abilities.description: Takes control of an enemy non-hero unit, elevating its status to a Creep-Hero, and granting it various stat bonuses. Cooldown: 45. Mana Cost: 50. Cast Range: 700. Min Base Health: 1000. Base Attack Damage Bonus: 25. Health Regen Bonus: 12.

Helm of the Overlord.name: Helm of the Overlord
Helm of the Overlord.description: The powerful headpiece of an undead necromancer.

abilities.name: Dominate
abilities.description: Takes control of an enemy non-hero unit, elevating its status to a Creep-Hero, and granting it various stat bonuses. Can dominate ancient creeps. Cooldown: 45. Mana Cost: 50. Cast Range: 700. Min Base Health: 1800. Base Attack Damage Bonus: 70. Health Regen Bonus: 12. If a target neutral creep has a scaling ability, its level gets increased and has its 4th level unlocked.

Holy Locket.name: Holy Locket
Holy Locket.description: A prized relic long thought lost forever in a failed crusade.

abilities.name: Energy Charge
abilities.description: Increases the target's incoming heal amplification, and uses up all charges to instantly heal and replenish the target's health and mana based on the number of charges. Number of Charges: 25. Cooldown: 13. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 600. Heal per Charge: 17. Mana Restore per Charge: 15.

abilities.name: Holy Blessing
abilities.description: Grants the wielder outgoing heal amplification, boosting all healing they provide. Outgoing Heal Amplification: 15%.

Hurricane Pike.name: Hurricane Pike
Hurricane Pike.description: A legendary pike once held as royal sigil of the ancient wyvern riders.

abilities.name: Hurricane Thrust
abilities.description: Pushes the caster and the enemy target away from each other. Cooldown: 19. Mana Cost: 150. Cast Range: 425. Push Distance: 425. Push Duration: 0.2. Attack Speed Bonus: 100. If the caster is ranged and the target is an enemy, greatly increases the caster's attack speed and grants them infinite attack range against the target for a few attacks, or until the buff expires. When cast on an ally or on self, pushes the target in the direction they are facing.

abilities.name: Dragon's Reach
abilities.description: Grants flat attack range bonus to ranged wielders. Attack Range Bonus: 130.

Hydra's Breath.name: Hydra's Breath
Hydra's Breath.description: Hydra's Breath is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Armaments.

abilities.name: Miasma
abilities.description: Attacks poison the target, dealing damage over time. Damage per Second: 2.5% of target's Max HP. Duration: 3.

abilities.name: Polycephaly
abilities.description: Ranged Only. Attacks have a chance to fire projectiles at 2 additional targets within a cone in front of the attacker. Does not trigger attack modifiers. Proc Chance: 30%. Search Range Buffer: 150. Bonus Attack Targets: 3. Additional Projectile Damage: 20 + 75% attack damage. Primary Attack Damage Bonus: 20.

Hyperstone.name: Hyperstone
Hyperstone.description: A mystical, carved stone that boosts the fervor of the holder.

Iron Branch.name: Iron Branch
Iron Branch.description: A seemingly ordinary branch, its ironlike qualities are bestowed upon the bearer.

abilities.name: Plant Tree
abilities.description: Tangoes are more effective when consuming a happy Iron Branch planted tree. Cooldown: 0. Cast Range: 400. Duration: 20.

Javelin.name: Javelin
Javelin.description: A rather typical spear that can sometimes pierce through an enemy's armor when used to attack.

abilities.name: Pierce

Kaya.name: Kaya

Kaya and Sange.name: Kaya and Sange

Khanda.name: Khanda
Khanda.description: A blade sharp enough to slice through magic itself.

Linken's Sphere.name: Linken's Sphere

Lotus Orb.name: Lotus Orb

abilities.name: Echo Shell

Maelstrom.name: Maelstrom

Mage Slayer.name: Mage Slayer

Manta Style.name: Manta Style

abilities.name: Mirror Image
abilities.description: Creates multiple mirrored illusions of the wielder that deals a portion of the wielder's damage and receives additional incoming damage. Cooldown: 34. Mana Cost: 125. Number of Illusions: 2. Duration: 18. Damage Dealt: 33%. Damage Taken: 300%.

Mantle of Intelligence.name: Mantle of Intelligence
Mantle of Intelligence.description: A beautiful sapphire mantle worn by generations of queens.

Mask of Madness.name: Mask of Madness
Mask of Madness.description: Once this mask is worn, its bearer becomes an uncontrollable aggressive force.

abilities.name: Berserk
abilities.description: The caster goes berserk, gaining movement and attack speed, at the cost of armor and losing the ability to cast spells for a while. Cooldown: 16. Mana Cost: 25. Move Speed Bonus: 8%/12%. Attack Speed Bonus: 110. Armor Reduction: 7. Duration: 6.

abilities.name: Lifesteal
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks steal their target's life, healing the wielder for a portion of physical attack damage dealt.

Mekansm.name: Mekansm

abilities.description: Restores health to nearby allies on cast. Cooldown: 50. Mana Cost: 100. Radius: 1200. Heal: 250. Stack Limit Duration: 49.

The meteor impact affects buildings as well, stunning and burning them. Buildings take less impact damage.

Mithril Hammer.name: Mithril Hammer
Mithril Hammer.description: A hammer forged of pure mithril.

Mjollnir.name: Mjollnir
Mjollnir.description: Thor's magical hammer, made for him by the dwarves Brok and Eitri.

Effect Radius: 900. Damage: 225.

abilities.description: Grants the wielder's attacks a chance to pierce through evasion, and to release a bolt of electricity on the target that leaps between other nearby targets, dealing magical damage to all of them. Cooldown: 0.2 seconds. Proc Chance: 25%. Bounce Distance: 650. Number of Bounces: 12. Damage: 180.

Monkey King Bar.name: Monkey King Bar
Monkey King Bar.description: A powerful staff used by a master warrior.

abilities.name: Pierce
abilities.description: Grants the wielder's attack a chance to pierce through evasion and deal bonus magical damage. Proc Chance: 80%. Bonus Magical Damage: 70.

Moon Shard.name: Moon Shard
Moon Shard.description: Said to be a tear from the lunar goddess Selemene.

abilities.name: Consume
abilities.description: Within a certain range, the wielder does not need to face the unit-targeted allied hero to grant them the permanent buff. Cooldown: 0. Cast Range: Global. Attack Speed Bonus: 60. Base Night Vision Bonus: 200. Ally Cast Range: 250.

abilities.name: Shade Sight
abilities.description: Grants the wielder bonus night vision. Night Vision Bonus: 400.

Morbid Mask.name: Morbid Mask

abilities.name: Lifesteal
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks steal their target's life, healing the wielder for a portion of physical attack damage dealt.

Mystic Staff.name: Mystic Staff
Mystic Staff.description: Enigmatic staff made of only the most expensive crystals.

Null Talisman.name: Null Talisman
Null Talisman.description: A small gemstone attached to several chains.

Nullifier.name: Nullifier
Nullifier.description: A dangerous weapon pilfered from an inverse dimension.

abilities.name: Nullify
abilities.description: Launches a projectile at the target enemy, that applies a debuff which continuously dispels them and slows their movement speed. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 900. Move Speed Slow: 10%. Duration: 4.

Oblivion Staff.name: Oblivion Staff
Oblivion Staff.description: Deceptively hidden as an ordinary quarterstaff, it is actually very powerful, much like the Eldritch who originally possessed it.

Observer Ward.name: Observer Ward
Observer Ward.description: A form of half-sentient plant, often cultivated by apprentice wizards.

abilities.name: Plant
abilities.description: Plants an invisible and phased Observer Ward at the target location, which grants ground vision around it. Cooldown: 1. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 500. Vision Radius: 1600. Ward Duration: 360. Hero Hit Count: 2. The player that placed the ward can always attack it with any of their units. However, all their attacks are treated as non-hero attacks, until the ward comes within the 50% deny range.

Octarine Core.name: Octarine Core
Octarine Core.description: At the core of spellcraft are spectrums only the very gifted can sense.

abilities.name: Cooldown Reduction
abilities.description: Reduces the wielder's cooldowns for all abilities and items. Cooldown Reduction: 25%.

Ogre Axe.name: Ogre Axe
Ogre Axe.description: You grow stronger just by holding it.

Orb of Blight.name: Orb of Blight
Orb of Blight.description: An unnerving stone unearthed beneath the Fields of Endless Carnage.

abilities.name: Lesser Corruption
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks apply an armor reducing debuff on enemy units. Armor Reduction: 2. Duration: 3.

Orb of Corrosion.name: Orb of Corrosion
Orb of Corrosion.description: Seepage from the wounds of a warrior deity, sealed in an arcanist's orb following a campaign of vicious slaughter.

abilities.description: The wielder's attacks apply armor reduction and movement speed slow on enemy units. Armor Reduction: 2. Move Speed Slow: 8%. Duration: 2. Health Restore Reduction: 16%. Move Speed Slow: 16%. The corrosive attacks also reduce the effectiveness of health restoration on the targets.

Orb of Frost.name: Orb of Frost
Orb of Frost.description: Slowly growing since the universe began, it will envelop everything when it ends.

abilities.description: The wielder's attacks apply a movement speed slow on enemy units. Move Speed Slow: 6%. Duration: 3. Health Restore Reduction: 13%. Move Speed Slow: 13%. The frigid attacks also reduce the effectiveness of health restoration on the targets.

Orb of Venom.name: Orb of Venom
Orb of Venom.description: Envenoms your veapon with the venom of a venomous viper.

abilities.name: Poison Attack

Orchid Malevolence.name: Orchid Malevolence
Orchid Malevolence.description: A garnet rod constructed from the essence of a fire demon.

abilities.name: Soul Burn

Overwhelming Blink.name: Overwhelming Blink
Overwhelming Blink.description: A horrifying dagger forged in the chaos maw and nigh untouchable by mortal hands.

abilities.description: Instantly teleports the wielder towards the targeted point. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: Global. Max Blink Distance: 1200. Radius: 800. Base Impact Damage: 100. After the teleportation, creates a huge shockwave that instantly deals damage to nearby enemies, based on the caster's strength, plus a base amount. Enemies also have their movement and attack speed slowed, and take additional damage over time based on the caster's strength.

Parasma.name: Parasma
Parasma.description: Warning: There is no antidote if picked up by the wrong end.

abilities.name: Witch Blade
abilities.description: The next attack poisons the target, slowing their movement speed and dealing damage over time, based on the wielder's intelligence. This attack cannot miss. Cooldown: 9 seconds. Intelligence as Damage per Second: 75%. Move Speed Slow: 25%. Duration: 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Magic Corruption
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks apply a magic resistance reducing debuff on enemy units. Duration: 4 seconds.

Pavise.name: Pavise
Pavise.description: Devised by a wizard who made one too many enemies.

abilities.name: Protect
abilities.description: Grants the target ally a physical damage barrier for a while. Cooldown: 16. Mana Cost: 60. Cast Range: 1000. Duration: 7.

Perseverance.name: Perseverance
Perseverance.description: A gem that grants heart to the bearer.

Phase Boots.name: Phase Boots
Phase Boots.description: Boots that allow the wearer to travel between the ether.

abilities.name: Phase
abilities.description: Increases the wielder's movement speed, and grants them phased movement for a while. Cooldown: 8. Mana Cost: 0. Move Speed Bonus: 10%. Duration: 3. Move Speed Bonus: 20%. Grants even more movement speed, and greatly improves the turn rate if the wielder is melee.

Phylactery.name: Phylactery
Phylactery.description: An amulet overflowing with powerful magics.

Pipe of Insight.name: Pipe of Insight

abilities.name: Insight Aura
abilities.description: Increases the health regeneration and magic resistance of nearby allies. Radius: 1200. Magic Resistance Bonus: 8%. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

Platemail.name: Platemail

Point Booster.name: Point Booster

Power Treads.name: Power Treads
Power Treads.description: A pair of tough-skinned boots that change to meet the demands of the wearer.

abilities.name: Switch Attribute
abilities.description: Meepo Clones cannot cast this ability. However, the Clones instantly update their switched attribute whenever the Prime switches the item's attributes. Cooldown: 0. Selected Attribute Bonus: 10.

Quelling Blade.name: Quelling Blade
Quelling Blade.description: The axe of a fallen gnome, it allows you to effectively maneuver the forest.

abilities.name: Quell
abilities.description: Grants the wielder bonus attack damage against non-hero units. Attack Damage Bonus: 8. Attack Damage Bonus: 4.

Radiance.name: Radiance

abilities.name: Burn
abilities.description: When active, scorches nearby enemies, dealing magical damage over time. Cooldown: 0. Mana Cost: 0. Radius: 650. Damage per Second: 60. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Damage per Second: 35. Burn applied by illusions deals less damage.

Reaver.name: Reaver
Reaver.description: A massive axe capable of tearing whole mountains down.

Refresher Orb.name: Refresher Orb
Refresher Orb.description: A powerful artifact created for wizards.

abilities.name: Reset Cooldowns
abilities.description: Resets the cooldowns of all abilities of the wielder. Cooldown: 180. Mana Cost: 325. On the first three uses, the item's cooldown increases.

Refresher Shard.name: Refresher Shard
Refresher Shard.description: Across an epoch of endless battle, the Immortal's will to triumph never faltered.

abilities.name: Reset Cooldowns
abilities.description: Resets the cooldowns of all abilities of the wielder. Cooldown: 180. Mana Cost: 200.

Revenant's Brooch.name: Revenant's Brooch
Revenant's Brooch.description: The cursed brooch of a fallen guardian who stalks forever between the veil of life and death.

abilities.name: Phantom Critical
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks have a chance to inflict critical magical damage. Proc Chance: 30%. Critical Damage: 80%.

Ring of Basilius.name: Ring of Basilius
Ring of Basilius.description: Ring given as a reward to the greatest mages.

abilities.name: Basilius Aura
abilities.description: Increases the mana regeneration of nearby allies. Radius: 1200. Mana Regeneration Bonus: 1. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

Ring of Health.name: Ring of Health
Ring of Health.description: A shiny ring found beneath a fat halfling’s corpse.

Ring of Protection.name: Ring of Protection
Ring of Protection.description: A glimmering ring that defends its bearer.

Ring of Regen.name: Ring of Regen

Ring of Tarrasque.name: Ring of Tarrasque

Robe of the Magi.name: Robe of the Magi

Rod of Atos.name: Rod of Atos

Sacred Relic.name: Sacred Relic
Sacred Relic.description: An ancient weapon that often turns the tides of war.

Sage's Mask.name: Sage's Mask
Sage's Mask.description: A mask commonly used by mages and warlocks for various rituals.

Sange.name: Sange
Sange.description: Sange is an unusually accurate weapon, seeking weak points automatically.

Sange and Yasha.name: Sange and Yasha
Sange and Yasha.description: Sange and Yasha, when attuned by the moonlight and used together, become a very powerful combination.

Satanic.name: Satanic

abilities.description: The wielder's attacks steal their target's life, healing the wielder for a portion of physical attack damage dealt.

Scythe of Vyse.name: Scythe of Vyse
Scythe of Vyse.description: The most guarded relic among the cult of Vyse, it is the most coveted weapon among magi.

Sentry Ward.name: Sentry Ward

Shadow Blade.description: The blade of a fallen king, it allows you to move unseen and strike from the shadows.

Attack Damage Bonus: 175. The attack breaking invisibility deals physical attack damage bonus with the attack.

Shawl.name: Shawl
Shawl.description: The page has not been checked

Shiva's Guard.name: Shiva's Guard

Mana Cost: 75. Radius: 825. Damage: 260. Move Speed Slow: 40%. Slow Duration: 4. Also weakens enemies hit by the wave, applying a debuff that amplifies any spell damage they take. The debuff is applied before the ability's damage is applied.

abilities.name: Freezing Aura
abilities.description: Reduces the attack speed of nearby enemies. Radius: 1200. Attack Speed Slow: 45. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

Skull Basher.name: Skull Basher

Search Range Buffer: 150. Bonus Attack Targets: 3. Additional Projectile Damage: 20 + 75% attack damage. Primary Attack Damage Bonus: 20.

Spirit Vessel.name: Spirit Vessel
Spirit Vessel.description: Forged by a god to entrap the soul of another.

abilities.name: Soul Release
abilities.description: When cast on an ally, consumes a charge to grant the target allied hero bonus health regeneration for a while. Number of Charges: ∞. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 750. Health Regen Bonus: 40. Duration: 8. When cast on an enemy, consumes a charge to deal damage over time to the target, based on their current health, as well as reduce the effectiveness of healing and health restoration the target receives.

Splintmail.name: Splintmail
Splintmail.description: Splintmail is an item purchasable at the Base Shop, under Equipment.

Staff of Wizardry.name: Staff of Wizardry

Swift Blink.name: Swift Blink
Swift Blink.description: A cunning blade able to anticipate and enable its bearer's movements.

abilities.description: Instantly teleports the wielder towards the targeted point. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: Global. Max Blink Distance: 1200. Move Speed Bonus: 40%. Agility Bonus: 35. After the teleportation, grants the caster phased movement, increased movement speed, and bonus agility for a while.

Talisman of Evasion.name: Talisman of Evasion
Talisman of Evasion.description: A necklace that allows you to anticipate enemy attacks.

Tango.name: Tango
Tango.description: Forage to survive on the battlefield.

abilities.name: Devour

Tiara of Selemene.name: Tiara of Selemene
Tiara of Selemene.description: A symbol of favor bestowed upon the high priestess of Selemene.

abilities.name: Boots of Travel
abilities.description: Automatically and passively refunds all Town Portal Scrolls at full cost in the dedicated slot. Town Portal Scroll Cooldown: 40/40.

Tranquil Boots.name: Tranquil Boots
Tranquil Boots.description: While they increase the longevity of the wearer, this boot is not particularly reliable.

abilities.name: Break
abilities.description: Whenever the wielder attacks a hero or is attacked by a any unit, the boots' passive health regeneration bonus is lost, and the movement speed bonus is reduced for a while. Cooldown: 13. Move Speed Loss: 25. Health Regen Loss: 14. Duration: 13.

Ultimate Orb.name: Ultimate Orb

Urn of Shadows.name: Urn of Shadows
Urn of Shadows.description: Contains the ashes of powerful demons.

abilities.name: Soul Release
abilities.description: When cast on an ally, consumes a charge to grant the target allied hero bonus health regeneration for a while. Number of Charges: ∞. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 0. Vanguard.name: Vanguard
Vanguard.description: A powerful shield that defends its wielder from even the most vicious of attacks.

abilities.name: Damage Block
abilities.description: Grants the wielder a chance to block a fixed portion of physical attack damage. Proc Chance: 60%. Blocked Damage: 50.

abilities.name: Spell Weakness

Vitality Booster.name: Vitality Booster
Vitality Booster.description: A ruby gemstone that has been passed down through generations of warrior kin.

Vladmir's Offering.name: Vladmir's Offering
Vladmir's Offering.description: An eerie mask that is haunted with the malice of a fallen vampire.

Void Stone.name: Void Stone
Void Stone.description: Jewelry that was once used to channel nether realm magic, this ring pulses with energy.

Voodoo Mask.name: Voodoo Mask

abilities.description: Restores the wielder's health for a portion of damage dealt by magical and physical spell damage. The lifesteal value is reduced by a factor of 0.2 against creeps.

Wind Lace.name: Wind Lace

Wind Waker.name: Wind Waker

Damage: 50. Set Speed: 300. If the target is an enemy, they also take damage upon landing. Cannot lift up Roshan, instead, it instantly applies the damage.

Witch Blade.name: Witch Blade

abilities.name: Witch Blade
abilities.description: The next attack poisons the target, slowing their movement speed and dealing damage over time, based on the wielder's intelligence. This attack cannot miss. Cooldown: 9 seconds. Intelligence as Damage per Second: 75%. Move Speed Slow: 25%. Duration: 4 seconds.

Wraith Band.name: Wraith Band
Wraith Band.description: A circlet with faint whispers echoing about it.

Yasha.name: Yasha

Yasha and Kaya.name: Yasha and Kaya
Yasha and Kaya.description: Yasha and Kaya when paired together share a natural resonance.

Ash Legion Shield.name: Ash Legion Shield

effects.primary: Applies a 160 physical damage barrier to all nearby player controlled units for 6 seconds, reducing their move speed by 20%.

Book of the Dead.name: Book of the Dead

effects.primary: Summons 2 Necronomicon Warriors and 2 Necronomicon Archers for 65 seconds. Each attack deals damage equal to 0.75 times the base attack damage plus 50% of the mana burnt from enemies, with a cooldown of 80 seconds.

notes: Demonic Warrior burns 50 mana per hit and deals 50% of that as additional damage.
Demonic Archer applies a basic dispel on target enemy and slows their movement speed by 100%, which decays to 20% over 4 seconds, with a cooldown of 15 seconds.

Chipped Vest.name: Chipped Vest
Chipped Vest.description: Provides passive damage return to both heroes and creeps when attacked.

effects.primary: Returns 30 damage to heroes and 15 damage to creeps every time you are attacked.

effects.primary: Spellover: Dealing 100 spell damage overheats the target, dealing 40 damage to heroes and 15 damage to other targets within a 300 unit radius.

notes: Damage increases with level: 40/15 at level 1, 52%/19.5% at max level.

Crippling Crossbow.name: Crippling Crossbow

effects.primary: Hits an enemy for 25 damage, slows their movement speed by 50%, and reduces the effectiveness of health restoration by 40%. The slow decays over time.

Dagger of Ristul.name: Dagger of Ristul

effects.primary: Consume 100 health to gain 25 attack damage bonus for 8 seconds. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

Defiant Shell.name: Defiant Shell
Defiant Shell.description: Grants the hero the ability to instantly counter-attack with 80% of their attack damage when attacked, with a cooldown of 5 seconds.

effects.primary: When attacked, the hero instantly counter-attacks a target within their attack range. Cooldown: 5. Attack Damage as Damage: 80%. Attack Damage as Damage: 104%.

Dezun Bloodrite.name: Dezun Bloodrite
Dezun Bloodrite.description: Grants an Ao E bonus to all spells of the wielder, including items. Mana Cost is treated as Health Cost with a 35% conversion rate.

effects.primary: Ao E Bonus: 19.5%, Mana Cost as Health Cost: 35%.

Divine Regalia.name: Divine Regalia
Divine Regalia.description: Increases the wielder's outgoing damage by 20% and then an additional 26%, providing a total damage amplification of 46%.

effects.primary: Increases outgoing damage by 20% and then an additional 26%.

Dormant Curio.name: Dormant Curio
Dormant Curio.description: Increases the potency of neutral items crafted while holding it.

effects.primary: Neutral items crafted while holding the Dormant Curio have their potency increased considerably.

Duelist Gloves.name: Duelist Gloves
Duelist Gloves.description: Grants the wielder increased attack speed when there are enemy heroes within a 1200-unit radius.

effects.primary: Increases attack speed by 20% as long as there are enemy heroes within a 1200-unit radius.

Enchanter's Bauble.name: Enchanter's Bauble
Enchanter's Bauble.description: Increases the bonuses of its Neutral Enchantment by a percentage that grows with each craft.

effects.primary: Increases the bonuses of the item's Neutral Enchantment by 15%. Every time this item is crafted again, the bonus is increased by 40%.

Essence Ring.name: Essence Ring
Essence Ring.description: Increases the caster's current and maximum health for a short time.

effects.primary: Increases the caster's current and maximum health by 312 for 10 seconds with a cooldown of 25 seconds and a mana cost of 160.

Fallen Sky.name: Fallen Sky
Fallen Sky.description: Transforms into a meteor, stunning enemies and dealing initial impact damage followed by continuous damage over time.

effects.primary: Transforms into a meteor after a delay, stunning enemies and dealing 150 impact damage with an additional 60 damage per second for a short duration. Affects buildings as well, stunning and burning them.

Flayer's Bota.name: Flayer's Bota
Flayer's Bota.description: Grants bonus attack damage and attack speed for a short duration when cast. Resets cooldown when an enemy hero dies within range.

effects.primary: Increases attack damage by 15% and attack speed by 30% for 6 seconds on cast.

notes: Cooldown resets when an enemy hero dies within a 1200 radius.

Forager's Kit.name: Forager's Kit
Forager's Kit.description: Unlocks the ability to forage nearby trees, yielding resources like flora, fungi, or gold.

effects.primary: Forages nearby trees for 1 second to obtain resources such as flora, fungi, or a bag of gold. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

Giant's Maul.name: Giant's Maul
Giant's Maul.description: Empowers the next attack with a critical hit and slows the target's movement, attack, and cast speed.

effects.primary: Critical Damage: 140%, Move Speed Slow: 10%, Attack Speed Slow: 15%, Cast Speed Slow: 20%, Duration: 3 seconds.

Gunpowder Gauntlet.name: Gunpowder Gauntlet
Gunpowder Gauntlet.description: Deals additional magical damage on the next attack with a cooldown of 10 seconds, and has a splash effect that deals 50% of the primary target's damage within a radius of 250 units.

effects.primary: The next attack deals 156 magical attack damage bonus to the primary target and additional 50% splash damage within 250 units. Cooldown: 10 seconds.

Harmonizer.name: Harmonizer
Harmonizer.description: Provides spell manacost reduction and spell amplification based on the cooldown status of spells.

effects.primary: Gain 5% spell manacost reduction for every spell off cooldown and 5% spell amplification for every spell on cooldown. Manacost Reduction per Spell Off Cooldown: 6.5%. Spell Amplification per Spell On Cooldown: 7.8%.

Idol of Scree'Auk.name: Idol of Scree'Auk
Idol of Scree'Auk.description: Grants slow resistance, evasion, and phased movement for a short duration.

effects.primary: Grants the wielder slow resistance (50%), evasion, and phased movement for 6.5 seconds with a cooldown of 30 seconds.

Jidi Pollen Bag.name: Jidi Pollen Bag
Jidi Pollen Bag.description: Spreads pollen on nearby enemies, reducing their health restoration effectiveness by 50% and dealing damage over time equal to 9% of their maximum health every second for 9 seconds.

effects.primary: Reduces health restoration effectiveness by 50% and deals 9% max health as damage per second over 9 seconds to nearby enemies within a 700 radius.

Kobold Cup.name: Kobold Cup
Kobold Cup.description: Grants movement speed to nearby allies for a short while on cast.

effects.primary: Grants 10% move speed bonus to nearby allies (Radius: 1000) for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 40. Mana Cost: 40.

Mana Draught.name: Mana Draught
Mana Draught.description: Restores mana over time through increased regeneration and provides a cooldown reduction near water sources.

effects.primary: Restores 70 mana plus 3% of max mana over 6 seconds, with a 60-second cooldown.

notes: Cooldown is reduced to 42 seconds when standing in waters.

Metamorphic Mandible.name: Metamorphic Mandible
Metamorphic Mandible.description: Transforms into an insect form for a short while, increasing magic resistance and movement speed but reducing armor.

effects.primary: Enter insect form for 5 seconds with +15% move speed, +50% magic resistance, and -45% armor. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

Minotaur Horn.name: Minotaur Horn
Minotaur Horn.description: Grants magic resistance and immunity to pure and reflected damage. Any negative effect from enemy spells has no effect for a duration of 2.6 seconds.

effects.primary: Applies a basic dispel. Grants magic resistance (50%) and immunity to pure and reflected damage. Any negative effect from enemy spells has no effect for a duration of 2.6 seconds.

Occult Bracelet.name: Occult Bracelet
Occult Bracelet.description: Provides mana regeneration upon being attacked.

effects.primary: Gains up to 5 stacks of 0.4 mana regen when attacked, lasting 5 seconds per stack.

Partisan's Brand.name: Partisan's Brand
Partisan's Brand.description: Increases spell damage dealt to player-controlled units by 9%.

effects.primary: Spell Damage Amp: 9%.

Pollywog Charm.name: Pollywog Charm
Pollywog Charm.description: Increases the health regeneration of a target ally for 14 seconds with a cooldown of 45 seconds and a cast range of 1000 units.

effects.primary: Increases the health regeneration of a target ally by 8 per second for 14 seconds.

Poor Man's Shield.name: Poor Man's Shield
Poor Man's Shield.description: Grants the wielder a chance to block a fixed portion of physical attack damage. Blocks melee attacks for 39 and ranged attacks for 26.

effects.primary: Reduces incoming physical damage by blocking melee attacks for 39 and ranged attacks for 26.

Possessed Mask.name: Possessed Mask
Possessed Mask.description: Heals the attacker for a fixed amount on each attack.

effects.primary: Heals the attacker for 5 HP on each attack.

notes: Lifesteal is not functional with illusions, but ability particles are visible.
Cannot lifesteal off of wards, buildings, and allied units.

Prophet's Pendulum.name: Prophet's Pendulum
Prophet's Pendulum.description: Reduces incoming damage by 30% and delays the remaining 70% over 5 seconds.

effects.primary: 30% of incoming damage is delayed over 5 seconds, with a total damage reduction of 30%.

Psychic Headband.name: Psychic Headband
Psychic Headband.description: Psychic Push: Cooldown 15, Cast Range 600, Push Distance 400/520, Push Duration 0.3.

effects.primary: Psychic Push: Cooldown 15, Cast Range 600, Push Distance 400/520, Push Duration 0.3.

Rattlecage.name: Rattlecage
Rattlecage.description: Releases bone projectiles towards nearby enemies after taking cumulative damage, dealing damage and slowing their movement and attack speed.

effects.primary: After the wielder cumulatively takes 220 damage within 7 seconds, bone projectiles are released towards up to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 110 damage and slowing them.

Riftshadow Prism.name: Riftshadow Prism
Riftshadow Prism.description: Creates an illusion at the cost of some health. The illusion has reduced damage dealt and increased damage taken.

effects.primary: Refract: Creates an illusion with full health, takes 8% of current HP as cost, deals 50% of damage, takes 200% of damage, lasts for 20 seconds.

Searing Signet.name: Searing Signet
Searing Signet.description: An item that ignites enemies within range when they receive magic damage over a threshold, causing them to take additional damage over time.

effects.primary: Burn Through: Enemies taking magic damage above 60 deal an additional 104 damage over 6 seconds if within 2000 units. Creeps receive half the damage.

Serrated Shiv.name: Serrated Shiv
Serrated Shiv.description: Deals bonus physical damage equal to a percentage of the target's current health and has a higher damage bonus against Roshan.

effects.primary: Attacks have a 20% chance to deal up to 18.4% (8% + 10.4%) of the target's current health as bonus physical damage, with an additional 260 attack damage bonus against Roshan.

Spellslinger.name: Spellslinger
Spellslinger.description: Recovers 20% of the mana used to cast abilities over 10 seconds, refunding an additional 26% of mana cost.

effects.primary: 20% of the mana used to cast abilities is recovered over 10 seconds, refunding an additional 26% of mana cost.

Spider Legs.name: Spider Legs
Spider Legs.description: Grants increased movement speed and turn rate to the caster, allowing for faster navigation and evasion.

effects.primary: Increases movement speed by 20% and turn rate by 50%. Duration: 14 seconds. Cooldown: 20 seconds.
Cooldown: 6.

Stygian Desolator.name: Stygian Desolator
Stygian Desolator.description: Reduces the armor of enemy units attacked by the wielder.

effects.primary: Applies an armor reducing debuff on enemy units. Armor Reduction: 13 for 7 seconds, then increases to 16.9.

Tumbler's Toy.name: Tumbler's Toy
Tumbler's Toy.description: An artifact that propels the caster forward at a distance of 390 units with a cooldown of 15 seconds.

effects.primary: Propels the caster a short distance forward. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 0. Leap Distance: 390.

Unrelenting Eye.name: Unrelenting Eye
Unrelenting Eye.description: Increases slow resistance but decreases it for every enemy hero within attack range.

effects.primary: Increases slow resistance to a maximum of 65%, decreasing by 10% for each enemy hero within attack range.

Weighted Dice.name: Weighted Dice
Weighted Dice.description: Enhances the wielder's base attack damage and creep gold bounty calculations by selecting the highest value from multiple computations.

effects.primary: Whenever the wielder's base attack damage or a creep gold bounty is calculated, the value is computed twice and the highest value is selected. Base Damage Maximum Bonus: 6.

Alert Enchantment.name: Alert Enchantment
Alert Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 1–4 neutral item enchantment for Agility and Universal heroes.

effects.primary: +7/15/23/31 Attack Speed, +0/0/0/100 Attack Range, +0/150/225/300 Night Vision.

Audacious Enchantment.name: Audacious Enchantment
Audacious Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 5 neutral item enchantment for Agility heroes only.

effects.primary: +80 Attack Damage, +100 Attack Speed, -10% Incoming Damage Reduction.

Brawny Enchantment.name: Brawny Enchantment
Brawny Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 1–4 neutral item enchantment for Strength and Agility heroes.

effects.primary: +110/150/190/230 Health+0/3/6/9 Health Regeneration+0/0/0/25% Slow Resistance.

Crude Enchantment.name: Crude Enchantment
Crude Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 2-4 neutral item enchantment for Strength heroes only.

effects.primary: -6% Intelligence, -6%/-9%/-12%% Base Attack Time, +10/15/20% Health Restore Amp.

Evolved Enchantment.name: Evolved Enchantment
Evolved Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 5 neutral item enchantment for all heroes.

effects.primary: +40 Primary Attribute OR +24 All Attributes.

Feverish Enchantment.name: Feverish Enchantment
Feverish Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 5 neutral item enchantment for Intelligence heroes only.

effects.primary: +15% Cooldown Reduction, -7% Mana Loss Reduction.

Fleetfooted Enchantment.name: Fleetfooted Enchantment
Fleetfooted Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 5 neutral item enchantment for all heroes.

effects.primary: +115 Move Speed.

Greedy Enchantment.name: Greedy Enchantment
Greedy Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 2–3 neutral item enchantment for all heroes.

effects.primary: +200/250 Mana, +30/60 Attack Damage, +75/100 Gold /min.

Hulking Enchantment.name: Hulking Enchantment
Hulking Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 5 neutral item enchantment for Strength heroes only.

effects.primary: +5% Health, +1.5% Max HP Health Regen, -30% Attack Speed.

Keen-Eyed Enchantment.name: Keen-Eyed Enchantment
Keen-Eyed Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 2–4 neutral item enchantment for Intelligence heroes only.

effects.primary: -10%/-12%/-14% Mana Regeneration +1/1.5/2 Mana Regeneration +125/135/145 Cast Range.

Manic Enchantment.name: Manic Enchantment
Manic Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 5 neutral item enchantment for Universal heroes only.

effects.primary: -18% Base Attack Time +20% Cast Speed -20% Vision.

Mystical Enchantment.name: Mystical Enchantment
Mystical Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 1–4 neutral item enchantment for Intelligence and Universal heroes.

effects.primary: +0.8/1.6/2.4/3.2 Mana Regeneration, +0/10/13/16% Magic Resistance, +0/0/0/15% Mana Loss Reduction.

Nimble Enchantment.name: Nimble Enchantment
Nimble Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 2-4 neutral item enchantment for Agility heroes only.

effects.primary: -1.5/-2.25/-3 Health Regeneration, +6%/8%/10% Move Speed, +10/15/20 Attack Damage.

Quickened Enchantment.name: Quickened Enchantment
Quickened Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 1–4 neutral item enchantment for all heroes.

Timeless Enchantment.name: Timeless Enchantment
Timeless Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 4–5 neutral item enchantment for all heroes.

effects.primary: +8/15% Debuff Duration Amp, +6/16% Spell Damage Amp.

Titanic Enchantment.name: Titanic Enchantment
Titanic Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 2-4 neutral item enchantment for Universal heroes only.

effects.primary: +10/12/14% Status Resistance, +8/12/16% Main Attack Damage, -10%/-12%/-14% Attack Speed.

Tough Enchantment.name: Tough Enchantment
Tough Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 1–4 neutral item enchantment for Strength and Intelligence heroes.

effects.primary: +0/4/6/8 Armor, +0/0/0/40% Knockback Resistance, +7/10/13/16 Attack Damage.

Vampiric Enchantment.name: Vampiric Enchantment
Vampiric Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 5 neutral item enchantment for all heroes.

effects.primary: +30% Lifesteal (Hero), +18% Lifesteal (Creep), +20% Spell Lifesteal (Hero), +4% Spell Lifesteal (Creep), +300 Night Vision.

Vital Enchantment.name: Vital Enchantment
Vital Enchantment.description: A guaranteed Tier 1 neutral item enchantment for all heroes.

effects.primary: +2 Health Regeneration.
